/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/absl_log_globals_test.dir/globals_test.cc.o -o ../../bin/absl_log_globals_test  libabsl_log_globals.a libabsl_log_internal_globals.a libabsl_log_internal_test_helpers.a ../base/libabsl_log_severity.a libabsl_scoped_mock_log.a ../../lib/libgmock_main.a libabsl_log_internal_conditions.a libabsl_log_internal_message.a ../debugging/libabsl_examine_stack.a libabsl_log_internal_format.a ../strings/libabsl_str_format_internal.a libabsl_log_internal_proto.a libabsl_log_internal_nullguard.a ../base/libabsl_strerror.a libabsl_log_initialize.a libabsl_log_internal_log_sink_set.a libabsl_log_globals.a ../hash/libabsl_hash.a ../hash/libabsl_city.a ../types/libabsl_bad_variant_access.a ../hash/libabsl_low_level_hash.a libabsl_vlog_config_internal.a ../types/libabsl_bad_optional_access.a libabsl_log_internal_fnmatch.a libabsl_log_internal_globals.a libabsl_log_sink.a libabsl_log_entry.a ../synchronization/libabsl_synchronization.a ../synchronization/libabsl_graphcycles_internal.a ../synchronization/libabsl_kernel_timeout_internal.a ../time/libabsl_time.a ../time/libabsl_civil_time.a ../time/libabsl_time_zone.a ../debugging/libabsl_stacktrace.a ../debugging/libabsl_symbolize.a ../strings/libabsl_strings.a ../numeric/libabsl_int128.a ../strings/libabsl_strings_internal.a ../strings/libabsl_string_view.a ../base/libabsl_malloc_internal.a ../base/libabsl_base.a ../base/libabsl_spinlock_wait.a -lrt ../debugging/libabsl_debugging_internal.a ../debugging/libabsl_demangle_internal.a ../debugging/libabsl_demangle_rust.a ../debugging/libabsl_decode_rust_punycode.a ../debugging/libabsl_utf8_for_code_point.a ../base/libabsl_throw_delegate.a ../base/libabsl_raw_logging_internal.a ../base/libabsl_log_severity.a ../../lib/libgmock.a ../../lib/libgtest.a
